metadata.system: Hˢ Direct — Higgins Coordinate Stage 1 Analysis

mathematical_lineage.closure: Aitchison (1986), The Statistical Analysis of Compositional Data
mathematical_lineage.shannon_entropy: Shannon (1948), A Mathematical Theory of Communication
mathematical_lineage.higgins_scale: H_s = 1 - H/ln(D), entropy complement, this work

operations: Op1: Closure to simplex — C(x) = x/Σx_j
Op2: CLR transform — h_j = ln(x_j) - mean(ln(x))
